behavior_summary: This script controls a 'floating platform' item that can appear, animate, and be cleaned up when actors enter/leave its trigger area. The U8P_APPEAR::look() handler shows the short description 'floating platform' to the player.
U8P_APPEAR::enterFastArea sets the item type and frame to an active/visible state and starts a multi-step appearance/animation sequence by calling U8P_APPEAR::func0136.
U8P_APPEAR::leaveFastArea sets the item back to a default frame/type and invokes FREE::resetRef to unregister/reset engine references (cleanup) when an actor leaves the fast-area.

U8P_APPEAR::func0136 is the core animator: it checks a makePlatformAppear guard, sequences Item::setFrame and Item::setType changes, spawns timed waits (spawn -> FREE::func1C19) between steps, plays a SFX once, and uses Item::getQuality to adjust delay/timing. A local counter (local1) is used to advance frames across suspend/wait cycles.
U8P_APPEAR::release inspects Item::getSurfaceWeight and, if zero, calls AccumulateDexterity(0x0F) — an inferred small gameplay side-effect when the platform is weightless.
U8P_APPEAR::func02C7 appears to trigger falling behavior via Item::fall when the item exists.
notable_control_flow: U8P_APPEAR::look() is a short inspect process that barks 'floating platform' then suspends — no branching.
U8P_APPEAR::enterFastArea -> setType(0x02AF)/setFrame(0x05) -> call U8P_APPEAR::func0136 to run appearance animation.

U8P_APPEAR::func0136 reads a 'makePlatformAppear' guard; when true it runs a looped sequence (local1 counter) that alternates setFrame/setType calls with spawned timed waits and a suspend to pace animation.
U8P_APPEAR::func0136 uses Item::getQuality (quality * 2) to compute spawn delays, so animation timing varies with item quality.
U8P_APPEAR::leaveFastArea performs state reset (setType/setFrame) and calls FREE::resetRef(0x0205, this) for cleanup rather than invoking the animation routine.
open_questions: Is 'makePlatformAppear' a global flag or item-specific property? Its read controls whether the animation runs but its origin is not present in this script (confidence: medium).
Exact mapping of type ids (0x02AF) and frame indices (0x05) to visible/hidden platform variants is inferred but not confirmed (confidence: medium).
The exact semantics of the value returned by spawn -> FREE::func1C19 (pid/temp) and how failures are handled across suspends are inferred from usage, not explicit (confidence: low).
Whether U8P_APPEAR::func02C7 is ever invoked by other scripts to force the platform to fall is unknown from this file alone (confidence: low).

main_function.name: U8P_APPEAR::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the player's short description when inspecting the item; emits the bark 'floating platform' and yields.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player uses the 'U8P_APPEAR::look' or inspect action on the item.

function_map.name: U8P_APPEAR::look
function_map.role: inspect/description handler (shows short description to player)

function_map.name: U8P_APPEAR::enterFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area entry trigger: set visible type/frame and start appearance animation

function_map.name: U8P_APPEAR::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: fast-area exit trigger: reset type/frame and cleanup references

function_map.name: U8P_APPEAR::release
function_map.role: U8P_APPEAR::release event handler; conditional gameplay side-effect (AccumulateDexterity) based on surface weight

function_map.name: U8P_APPEAR::func0136
function_map.role: appearance/animation sequencer: frame/type changes, timed waits, SFX, uses quality to vary timing

function_map.name: U8P_APPEAR::func02C7
function_map.role: utility to initiate Item::fall (trigger fall behavior) or return sentinel

internal_calls.purpose: Start the multi-step appearance/animation sequence after setting initial visible state

external_calls.purpose: Switch item type to an active/visible variant (called with 0x02AF)
Set initial animation/frame (called with 0x05) for the appearance sequence
Reset item type on exit (put into default/hidden state)
Unregister/reset engine references for cleanup when leaving fast-area
Read surface weight to decide whether to award/accumulate dexterity
Apply or accumulate a dexterity-related effect (argument 0x0F) when surface weight == 0
Read item quality; used to compute spawn delay (quality * 2) and vary animation timing
Create timed waits/delays between animation frames; returns pid used with suspend
Change animation frame repeatedly as part of the appearance sequence
Switch item type ids during animation to toggle behavior/visual variant
Play a sound effect during the appearance animation
Initiate falling behavior for the item (passes address of a local as out/handle)

reads.name: makePlatformAppear
reads.likely_effect: Guard to decide whether the appearance/animation sequence in U8P_APPEAR::func0136 should run

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script controls a 'floating platform' item that can appear, animate, and be cleaned up when actors enter/leave its trigger area. The U8P_APPEAR::look() handler shows the short description 'floating platform' to the player.
